name: website-skills
description: Milo's house conventions for building production-grade Next.js + Tailwind websites on the DeployNow stack.

plugins.name: website-skills
plugins.description: Conventions for building Next.js App Router + Tailwind/DaisyUI websites on the DeployNow stack — server-first RSC/SSR, file/component naming, layout stability + trace-upward debugging, WebP images, Web Vitals, error handling, Vercel deploy, and mobile-first patterns (tab rows → horizontal scroll).
